query:
SELECT cph.*, c.name as customer_name, pv.sku as variant_sku
FROM customer_price_history cph
LEFT JOIN customer c ON cph.customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON cph.product_id = pv.id
WHERE c.name = 'ABC Furniture' AND pv.sku LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY cph.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
